task: Check the hourly forecast for Boston.
graderReasoning: The agent successfully navigated to AccuWeather, searched for Boston, selected Boston, MA, and opened the hourly forecast page at https://www.accuweather.com/en/us/boston/02108/hourly-weather-forecast/348735. The page snapshot explicitly showed hourly forecast details for 9 PM, 10 PM, and 11 PM, along with current conditions and the looking-ahead note. The final response accurately summarized the visible hourly forecast for Boston.
final_result_response:
AccuWeather hourly forecast for Boston, MA:

- Current: 58°F, cloudy
- 9 PM: 57°F, RealFeel 52°, cloudy, 37% chance of precipitation, S wind 13 mph
- 10 PM: 57°F, RealFeel 51°, cloudy, 33% chance, S wind 12 mph
- 11 PM: 56°F, RealFeel 51°, cloudy, 32% chance, S wind 10 mph

Looking ahead: AccuWeather says rainy weather is expected before dawn tomorrow through Friday afternoon.
action_history: Opening AccuWeather: const p1 = await openTab('https://www.accuweather.com/');
Trying full location search: await page.locator('e11').fill('Boston, MA');
